case_title: DESALES CAYATANO A. VS DELA CRUZ EDNA B.

CERT. RECEIPT TO EDNA DELA CRUZ RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESALES CAYATANO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELA CRUZ EDNA B. $555.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $555.00 FILED BY DESALES CAYATANO A. AS TO DEFENDANT DELA CRUZ EDNA B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DELA CRUZ EDNA B.
